title: google-labs-code/stitch-skills
friendlyTitle: A library of reusable skills for AI coding agents
summary: Google Labs’ Stitch Skills repository collects Agent Skills designed for the Stitch MCP server and compatible with coding agents such as Antigravity, Gemini CLI, Claude Code, and Cursor.
friendlySummary: This Google Labs repo collects skills that can work with several coding agents and the Stitch MCP server.
whyItMatters: Builders can study or adapt the skills as reusable agent capabilities, especially for MCP-connected coding and design workflows where standardized skill packaging matters.
friendlyWhyItMatters: It can help developers see how to package repeatable tasks so AI agents can use them more reliably.
